text:
There once upon a time, a humble cat named Whiskers lived under an old oak tree. He dreamed of journeys across strange countries. Every night he'd listen to the moonlit whispers.

One moonlit night, Whiskers heard an odd voice calling to him. Silvana the owl.

"I dream too," she said softly.

"Of mountains so tall they touch the stars?"

"Oh yes."

"To learn their secrets."

"You'd make an excellent owl."

Days turned into weeks. Whiskers taught Silvana how to fly.

Every night, they'd fly together.

Whiskers couldn't sleep without thinking of her.

You make a perfect moon.

They soared over starfields.

You have wings like mine.

They soared forever.

And then silvery dreams.

Go to sleep.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
